texts.orig: Training of PRO-courses against freelancing is possible, plus training materials, cost and logis. Duration of stay / freelancing periods vary on initial level and aspired Pro level between two and six month. The course price includes all necassary dives, theory, dry knowledge and practical commitment. PRO courses only after previous agreement.

table_cells.text: DIVING COURSES
EUR
Try Scuba Dive & Experience dive into the sea, 1 dive from boat, instructor included (no diving certification required)
Try Scuba Dive & Experience dive into the sea, 2 dives from boat, instructor included (no diving certification required)
+ KWS National
BEGINNER COURSES (min. age 10 years)
EUR
SSI Scuba Diver course, 4 dives pool/sea & 3 theory lessions, duration 2 days
SSI/PADI Open Water Diver referral (4 dives at 2 days, only with referral form) SSI Open Water Kurs, 8 dives pool/sea, 6 theory lessions, duration 4 days
your personal logbook is included in all above beginner courses!
SSI digital Certification / D-Card (incl. online study material for 3 month validity) alternative: SSI digital certification/D-Card + Diamond study material
C-Card printed
There will be no rental equipment charge for regular dives after completing a beginner course !
CONTINIOUS EDUCATION

SSI Advanced Adventurer course (2 days = 5 dives in different specialty fields) SSI Stress & Rescue Diver course (3 days, incl. theory and all necassary dives/scenarios) SSI Nitrox course EAN 40%, duration approx. 2 hours, theory only after passing our Nitrox course you will receive your "Nitrox for free" up to 10 days etc)

SSI Specialty course excl.dives, choose btw: Navigation, Drift, Night & ltd.visibility, perf. buoyancy, SSI Specialty deep diving excl. dives after 2 SSI Specialty courses you receive the "SSI Specialty Diver" for free

after 5 SSI Spec. courses + Stress & Rescue you receive the "SSI Master Diver" for free SSI digital certification / Specialty D-Card (incl. online SSI Diamond study material) PADI courses are available on request.
+ KWS National park entrance fee per day SSI PROFESSIONAL EDUCATION
* SSI Science
on request
SSI Dive Guide (using practical application and background information, guiding of certified divers) SSI Dive Control Specialist (teaching Scuba Skills Update, Try Scuba or assist inOWD courses)
on request on request
